signals.headline: XRP Surges on Record ETF Inflows and New Partnership | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
XRP Surges on Record ETF Inflows and New Partnership | YES | HIGH**  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—the largest in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week—driving a 12.5% price surge from April lows to around $1.44, with cumulative inflows hitting $1.26 billion.[1]  
Ripple announced a partnership with South Korea’s Kyobo Life Insurance
